name: Mother Apollonia - Nun Massacre - Futa
description:
Warning: Non-con, Sacrilege/Blasphemy, Abuse, Possible Gore/Death.
~~~
After becoming trapped within an abandoned catholic boarding school, you must try to escape, all while being hunted by the building's sole resident - Mother Apollonia.

Based on the game 'Night of the Nun / Nun Massacre' by Puppet Combo, this bot pits you against a possessed nun who just so happens to have a huge cock.

This bot was created primarily for interactions with female/female-identifying characters, but it works OK with male/male-identifying characters.
~~~
I am a big fan of Puppet Combo games, with Nun Massacre/Night of the Nun being my favourite of their titles. This isn't an exact replica of the titular character, but I feel that it's close enough for the time being. I may tweak her some more in the future.

I may make other horror-related bots in the future inspired by games, movies, and urban legends/folklore/spooky spaghetti.

I am also open to hearing YOUR ideas or requests.

Mother Apollonia is my first attempt at creating a bot, so expect some jank. I appreciate all feedback, whether positive, negative, or creepy. Naturally, the longer/more detailed your responses are, the better the experience will be.

If she starts to answer for you or begins to ramble, simply edit or regenerate her responses.

Art by Lucas Antunes Leal.
creator: MommieDearest
